content.text: Let me check the v6 AccordionItem API. In PF v6, `AccordionItem` wraps `AccordionToggle` and `AccordionContent`, and the `isExpanded` prop moved to `AccordionItem`. Also, `AccordionContent` no longer has `isHidden` — visibility is controlled by `AccordionItem`'s `isExpanded` prop. Let me verify:

Now I can see the issue. In v6:

1. **AccordionItem** now takes `isExpanded` prop (controls expansion state for its children)
2. **AccordionToggle** no longer takes `isExpanded` — it's moved to `AccordionItem`
3. **AccordionContent** no longer takes `isHidden` — visibility is controlled by `AccordionItem`'s `isExpanded`

The current code at lines 131-144:
```jsx
<AccordionItem key={group.id + '_item'}>
  <AccordionToggle
    id={group.id + '_toggle'}
    isExpanded={group.id === this.props.expandedGroupId}
    onClick={() => { this.props.toggleGroup(group); }}
  >
    {group.title} {getUnreadMessageLabel(group.messages)}
  </AccordionToggle>
  <AccordionContent id={group.id + '_content'} isHidden={group.id !== this.props.expandedGroupId}>
    <AlertDrawerGroup key={group.id} group={group} />
  </AccordionContent>
</AccordionItem>
```

Needs to become:
```jsx
<AccordionItem key={group.id + '_item'} isExpanded={group.id === this.props.expandedGroupId}>
  <AccordionToggle
    id={group.id + '_toggle'}
    onClick={() => { this.props.toggleGroup(group); }}
  >
    {group.title} {getUnreadMessageLabel(group.messages)}
  </AccordionToggle>
  <AccordionContent id={group.id + '_content'}>
    <AlertDrawerGroup key={group.id} group={group} />
  </AccordionContent>
</AccordionItem>
```

For Fix 2 (Card), the type changed from `FunctionComponent` to `ForwardRefExoticComponent` — this is a type-level change only. No removed props are used. No code changes needed.

Let me apply the changes:

                          id={group.id + '_toggle'}

                            this.props.toggleGroup(group);
                          }}
                        >
                          {group.title} {getUnreadMessageLabel(group.messages)}
                        </AccordionToggle>
                        <AccordionContent id={group.id + '_content'}>
                          <AlertDrawerGroup key={group.id} group={group} />
                        </AccordionContent>
                      </AccordionItem>
arguments.before:

                        <AccordionToggle

                          }}

                        </AccordionToggle>
                        <AccordionContent id={group.id + '_content'} isHidden={group.id !== this.props.expandedGroupId}>
                          <AlertDrawerGroup key={group.id} group={group} />
                        </AccordionContent>
                      </AccordionItem>

content.text: Let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. Let me verify the key changes are properly applied:

1. **Line 131**: `<AccordionItem>` now has `isExpanded={group.id === this.props.expandedGroupId}` — moved from `AccordionToggle`
2. **Lines 132-136**: `<AccordionToggle>` no longer has `isExpanded` prop — only `id` and `onClick` remain
3. **Line 140**: `<AccordionContent>` no longer has `isHidden` prop — visibility is now controlled by `AccordionItem`'s `isExpanded`

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 (Line 10 — AccordionItem, family:Accordion)
**Applied.** Migrated to v6 Accordion API:
- Moved `isExpanded={group.id === this.props.expandedGroupId}` from `<AccordionToggle>` to `<AccordionItem>` (line 131) — in v6, expansion state is managed by `AccordionItem`
- Removed `isExpanded` prop from `<AccordionToggle>` (line 134) — no longer accepted in v6
- Removed `isHidden` prop from `<AccordionContent>` (line 140) — visibility is now controlled by the parent `AccordionItem`'s `isExpanded` prop
- No import changes needed — `AccordionItem` was already imported

### Fix 2 (Line 3 — Card, family:Card)
**Already compatible — no change needed.** The Card type changed from `FunctionComponent<CardProps>` to `ForwardRefExoticComponent<Omit<CardProps, "ref"> & RefAttributes>`, which is a type-level change only. The file does not use any of the removed Card props (`hasSelectableInput`, `isDisabledRaised`, `isFlat`, `isRounded`, `isSelectableRaised`, `onSelectableInputChange`, `selectableInputAriaLabel`). The existing Card composition structure (`Card > CardHeader > CardTitle`, `Card > CardBody`) already matches the v6 pattern. `CardBody` and `CardTitle` are already imported. `CardFooter` is not used in this file, so no import was added.

1. **Line 131**: `<AccordionItem>` now has `isExpanded={group.id === this.props.expandedGroupId}` — moved from `AccordionToggle`
2. **Lines 132-136**: `<AccordionToggle>` no longer has `isExpanded` prop — only `id` and `onClick` remain
3. **Line 140**: `<AccordionContent>` no longer has `isHidden` prop — visibility is now controlled by `AccordionItem`'s `isExpanded`

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 (Line 10 — AccordionItem, family:Accordion)
**Applied.** Migrated to v6 Accordion API:
- Moved `isExpanded={group.id === this.props.expandedGroupId}` from `<AccordionToggle>` to `<AccordionItem>` (line 131) — in v6, expansion state is managed by `AccordionItem`
- Removed `isExpanded` prop from `<AccordionToggle>` (line 134) — no longer accepted in v6
- Removed `isHidden` prop from `<AccordionContent>` (line 140) — visibility is now controlled by the parent `AccordionItem`'s `isExpanded` prop
- No import changes needed — `AccordionItem` was already imported

### Fix 2 (Line 3 — Card, family:Card)
**Already compatible — no change needed.** The Card type changed from `FunctionComponent<CardProps>` to `ForwardRefExoticComponent<Omit<CardProps, "ref"> & RefAttributes>`, which is a type-level change only. The file does not use any of the removed Card props (`hasSelectableInput`, `isDisabledRaised`, `isFlat`, `isRounded`, `isSelectableRaised`, `onSelectableInputChange`, `selectableInputAriaLabel`). The existing Card composition structure (`Card > CardHeader > CardTitle`, `Card > CardBody`) already matches the v6 pattern. `CardBody` and `CardTitle` are already imported. `CardFooter` is not used in this file, so no import was added.
